title: T7 Self-learning: the ONE reflective-review engine (staleness scan + review briefs, 4 targets)
prompt: Build tools/reflective-review/ in ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory — ONE config-driven staleness engine applied 4x, per backlog/concepts.md's own 'Idea-staleness' + 'Periodic REFRESH + recategorization' rows and David's design-resolution ruling (JSON+schema = source of truth, staleness is date math, no database, LLM = the judge). Two files: targets.json (4 targets: concepts = backlog/concepts.md table rows via per-line git blame, threshold 21d; docs = docs/**/*.md excluding kdd/, per-file git log, 30d; workflows = .claude/workflows/*.workflow.js + .claude/skills SOP files, git, 45d; memory = ~/.claude/projects/-Users-davidcruwys-dev-ad-apps-dark-factory/memory/*.md, NOT a git repo so mtime basis, 21d — each target also carries its own review_questions list) and review.py (stdlib-only: 'scan <target>|--all' writes out/<target>.json — schema reflective-review/scan.v1, items sorted stalest-first with id/path/line/last_touched/age_days/stale/date_basis, untracked-or-dirty git files fall back to mtime-untracked, missing root = honest error field + exit 0; 'brief <target>|--all' rescans and renders out/<target>-brief.md = stale-items table + the target's review questions + a proposals-only footer; '--self-test' = 7 fixture cases in temp dirs incl. a temp git repo with env-forced commit dates and a table-row parse case, printing 'self-test: 7/7 cases ok'; no/unknown command exits 2). Then run scan --all and brief --all against the real targets, and do ONE demonstration judgment pass yourself: read out/concepts-brief.md and write out/judgments/<date>-concepts.md with per-stale-item verdicts (KEEP / RE-LANE / MERGE / STATUS-FIX / ARCHIVE-CANDIDATE, cap 25, grounded reasons, 'Proposals only' footer) — apply NOTHING to concepts.md content. Register the tool as one row in docs/tool-registry.md's repo-scripts table and flip only the two concepts.md rows' status cells from planned to building. No SKILL.md, no cron/trigger wiring, no tickets emitted, nothing queued; never edit .claude/ workflows/skills, experiments/, research/, canonical/, or engine/*.py; complement-don't-replace: doc-drift/doc-review/delivery-review/daily-review stay untouched. Commit and push dark-factory. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T7-01-reflective-review-engine.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: tools/reflective-review/{targets.json,review.py} exist; targets.json parses with exactly 4 targets; review.py imports only stdlib. python3 tools/reflective-review/review.py --self-test exits 0 printing 7 ok lines and 'self-test: 7/7 cases ok'. No-args and unknown-target invocations exit 2 without traceback. scan --all exits 0 writing out/{concepts,docs,workflows,memory}.json with item_count floors 50/40/15/10 respectively (memory may instead carry a non-null error field if the auto-memory dir moved — Fork F2), concepts granularity table-row, memory date_basis mtime, no negative age_days. brief --all writes four out/<target>-brief.md each containing 'Review questions' and the 'never auto-apply' footer. out/judgments/*-concepts.md exists with >=1 verdict line matching KEEP|RE-LANE|MERGE|STATUS-FIX|ARCHIVE-CANDIDATE and a 'Proposals only' footer. docs/tool-registry.md gains exactly one reflective-review row; backlog/concepts.md diff is only the two status cells (grep 'detection shipped' and 'recurring cadence still owed' hit once each). Negative: git status clean under research/, canonical/, experiments/, engine/; .claude/ unchanged since HEAD~1; no tools/reflective-review/SKILL.md; nothing named reflective in engine/store/queue/. The feat(tools) commit is pushed and the seam files are clean.
